ogTitle: Bohle vs Boigu Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bohle and Boigu Island.
heading: Bohle vs Boigu Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bohle, Queensland and Boigu Island, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bohle has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Boigu Island (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bohle or Boigu Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bohle has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Boigu Island scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bohle scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Boigu Island scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bohle or Boigu Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bohle has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
